'''Mayvitch 7''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Amador]] in the [[Chalenor system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was colonized by [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists from [[Immalia]] who established a small outpost on it to protect their mining operations from pirate attacks. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], during the [[Yinchorri Uprising]], the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] conquered the moon during the [[Battle of Mayvitch 7]].

{{Moon-stub}}
